ONE OUT-BUILDING BLOWN DOWN AND ANOTHER NEARBY OUT-BUILDING MOVED OFF ITS FOUNDATION. A PORTION OF AN ADJACENT FENCE WAS BLOWN DOWN, AND MINOR SHINGLE DAMAGE OCCURRED TO TWO NEARBY HOMES. A BASKETBALL GOAL WAS BLOWN SEVERAL HUNDRED FEET. AFTER EXTENSIVE REVIEW OF DAMAGE PHOTOS AND RADAR DATA, AND AFTER SPEAKING TO THE HOMEOWNERS, IT HAS BEEN DETERMINED THAT THE CAUSE OF THE DAMAGE WAS A STRAIGHT-LINE THUNDERSTORM WIND GUST.
